name: su.hpt/hptsu-mcp
description: Search the hpt.su database of Russian/EAEU vehicle compliance documents — type approvals (ОТТС/СБКТС/ОТШ), conformity certificates and declarations (ТР ТС/ТР ЕАЭС), type-approval notifications (СУТ). Read-only Bearer-auth client over the official https://hpt.su/api/v1/ REST API.

environmentVariables.name: HPTSU_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer API key issued in the hpt.su cabinet (requires active API_TIER subscription).

environmentVariables.name: HPTSU_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override of the API base URL.
